transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling First National Bank. My name is Sarah. Can I take your full name and date of birth to verify your identity?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yes, it's James Thornton, fourteenth of March 1988.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you Mr. Thornton, I've verified your account. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I ordered a replacement card about ten days ago and it still hasn't arrived. I'm getting a bit worried.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I completely understand, that must be frustrating. Let me pull up the card order now. I can see it was dispatched six days ago by standard post — delivery is typically five to seven working days, so you should receive it by Thursday at the latest.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Okay, that's reassuring. Can you confirm it went to the right address?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Of course. I can read back the first line of the address on file — it shows 14 Maple Avenue. Is that correct?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: If it hasn't arrived by end of day Thursday, please call us back and we can cancel and reissue with tracked delivery at no charge. I've made a note on your account.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Great, I'll wait until Thursday then. Thanks for your help.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: My pleasure. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
